**Clinical**: Ecstasy therapy calling for peak experience processing and integration development
**Spiritual**: Divine ecstasy calling for faithful transcendence and spiritual rapture stewardship
**Philosophical**: Human ecstasy calling for wisdom about transcendence and appropriate integration development
